title: Horizon Optimized
description: Boost your graphics and performance with zero hassle. Horizon Optimized for 1.21+ cuts lag spikes and lifts FPS, giving you smooth, stable gameplay right away.
body:
### Performance

Horizon Optimized runs faster than most clients. It uses modern mods like Sodium and Lithium and more to boost FPS and reduce lag. Every mod is picked with care to keep your worlds safe and smooth on any system.

### Familiar Experience

Horizon Optimized keeps Minecraft feeling the way you remember. You can use controllers, play local worlds with friends, and view advancements in a clean, large UI without changing the core game feel.

### Universal Compatibility

Horizon Optimized avoids content mods, so it works with almost any world or server. You can launch it with any client, but some launchers offer a smoother setup and better support.

### Always Up-to-Date

Horizon Optimized updates fast and often. It usually supports new Minecraft versions early, and updates aim to keep your settings intact.

### Fabric-Based

Horizon Optimized runs on Fabric, a lightweight and fast mod loader. You can also use it as a base to add your own mods.

### Open Development

Horizon Optimized is open-source, along with most of its mods. Feedback and suggestions are always welcome.
